summary: The legal linked list contains at most 30 nodes, which is too narrow to support an honest runtime scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: the nonempty linked list contains no more than 30 nodes

replacement_checks.evidence: The implementation advances to the next node exactly once per iteration and performs one constant-time accumulator update per node.
Regression exhaustively checks every bit pattern through length 12 and independently checks maximum-length boundary patterns against base-two conversion.
